description: Telegram notifications and bidirectional integration — push notifications on agent events, receive bot commands, approve requests with inline buttons, run multi-agent sessions in threads, handle media intake, and deploy proactive suggestion watches

capabilityDescriptions.companies.read: Read AoA company data for per-company chat routing
capabilityDescriptions.projects.read: Read AoA project data for issue context and forum topic routing
capabilityDescriptions.issues.read: Read AoA issues to post notifications and populate Telegram messages
capabilityDescriptions.issues.create: Create AoA issues from Telegram bot commands
capabilityDescriptions.issues.update: Update AoA issue status from Telegram approval callbacks and commands
capabilityDescriptions.issue.comments.read: Read AoA issue comments for bridging inbound Telegram replies
capabilityDescriptions.issue.comments.create: Create AoA issue comments from inbound Telegram replies
capabilityDescriptions.agents.read: Read AoA agent status for /status and /agents commands
capabilityDescriptions.agents.invoke: Invoke AoA agents from Telegram commands and handoffs
capabilityDescriptions.agent.sessions.create: Start new agent sessions from Telegram threads
capabilityDescriptions.agent.sessions.list: List active agent sessions for a thread
capabilityDescriptions.agent.sessions.send: Send messages to agent sessions from Telegram
capabilityDescriptions.agent.sessions.close: Close agent sessions initiated from Telegram
capabilityDescriptions.agent.tools.register: Expose escalate_to_human, handoff_to_agent, discuss_with_agent, and register_watch tools to AoA agents
capabilityDescriptions.events.subscribe: Listen for issue, approval, and agent lifecycle events
capabilityDescriptions.events.emit: Emit plugin events for cross-plugin coordination (e.g. ACP handoff)
capabilityDescriptions.plugin.state.read: Read stored chat mappings, session registry, and escalation state
capabilityDescriptions.plugin.state.write: Store chat mappings, session registry, watch state, and escalation state
capabilityDescriptions.secrets.read-ref: Resolve Telegram bot token and AoA board API key from the secrets store
capabilityDescriptions.activity.log.write: Log approval decisions and agent actions to the AoA activity log
capabilityDescriptions.metrics.write: Emit notification count, command, and escalation metrics
capabilityDescriptions.jobs.schedule: Register recurring jobs for digest delivery, escalation timeouts, and proactive watches
capabilityDescriptions.ui.page.register: Register the Telegram settings UI page
